feature: Dashboard UX Overhaul — Fix All 42 Findings
description: Complete remediation of all critical bugs, design issues, and missing features identified by the dual UX/UAT review swarms. 5 sprints, 20 tasks, ordered by severity and dependency.

phases.name: Sprint 1: Critical Bugs
phases.description: Fix 5 critical/major bugs that break core functionality.

gate.command: cd hex-nexus && cargo check && cd assets && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.name: Fix chat auth token — stop reading location.hash
tasks.description: UAT-F02: getAuthToken() in stores/chat.ts:36-45 reads location.hash for auth tokens but hash is used for routing. Change to read from localStorage or a query parameter. Also fix the WebSocket URL construction.

tasks.name: Add file-viewer Match case in App.tsx
tasks.description: UAT-F03: file-viewer route is defined in router.ts but no <Match> case in App.tsx Switch block. Add <Match when={route().page === 'file-viewer'}> rendering FileTreeView with the file path pre-selected.

tasks.name: Fix useTable callback cleanup on reconnect
tasks.description: UAT-F04: useTable hook registers onInsert/onUpdate/onDelete callbacks in createEffect but never unregisters them. On SpacetimeDB reconnect, duplicates accumulate. Add onCleanup() to the effect that removes old callbacks.

tasks.name: Fix health resolveProjectPath to use active project
tasks.description: UAT-F08: health.ts resolveProjectPath() always picks projs[0].path. Change to use the active project from router store (route().projectId) and find the matching project path.

tasks.name: Fix truncate_str UTF-8 safety in chat.rs
tasks.description: UAT-F15: truncate_str in chat.rs:770-776 slices by byte index, can panic on multi-byte UTF-8. Change to s.chars().take(max).collect::<String>() or s.get(..max).unwrap_or(s) with char boundary check.

phases.name: Sprint 2: Session + Chat Persistence
phases.description: Wire frontend session store to backend CRUD API, load chat history, add agent kill button.

tasks.name: Wire session store to /api/sessions backend
tasks.description: UAT-F01: session.ts uses only createSignal with no persistence. Wire to backend: on init call GET /api/sessions to load, on create call POST /api/sessions, on switch call GET /api/sessions/{id}. Persist active session ID in localStorage.

tasks.name: Load chat history from backend on connect
tasks.description: UAT-F10: Chat messages are in-memory only. On WebSocket connect, fetch message history from /api/sessions/{id}/messages and populate chatMessages signal. Show loading indicator during fetch.

tasks.name: Add agent kill button to AgentFleet view
tasks.description: Missing Feature #1: Backend has DELETE /api/agents/{id} but no UI button. Add a kill/terminate button to each agent card in AgentFleet.tsx with confirmation dialog. Call REST endpoint and show toast on success/failure.

tasks.name: Add workplan execute/pause/resume buttons
tasks.description: Missing Feature: Backend has POST /api/workplan/execute, /pause, /resume but no UI. Add action buttons to WorkplanView.tsx execution table rows. Execute opens a file picker for workplan JSON, pause/resume toggle based on status.

phases.name: Sprint 3: Design System Cleanup
phases.description: Eliminate dual styling, remove inline styles, fix theming, remove dead code.

tasks.name: Refactor ControlPlane inline styles to Tailwind
tasks.description: UX-F03: ControlPlane.tsx has ~120 lines of inline style={{}} objects with hardcoded hex colors. Convert all to Tailwind utility classes using theme-aware colors (bg-gray-900 instead of #111827, text-cyan-400 instead of #22D3EE, etc.).

tasks.name: Refactor ProjectDetail and BottomBar inline styles
tasks.description: UX-F04/F12: ProjectDetail.tsx tab buttons use hardcoded border-bottom: 2px solid #0E7490. BottomBar.tsx mode pill uses hardcoded rgba() colors. Convert to CSS variables or Tailwind classes.

tasks.name: Remove font size !important overrides and fix light theme
tasks.description: UX-F01/F02: dashboard.css has blanket !important overrides on all Tailwind text sizes (lines 89-102) and 12+ brittle [style*='...'] selectors for light theme (lines 173-196). Remove the !important block. Replace [style*] selectors with proper CSS variable theming.

tasks.name: Remove dead code — Sidebar.tsx, ProjectCard.tsx, legacy styles
tasks.description: UX-F05/F20: Sidebar.tsx (288px wide) is imported but never rendered — remove it. ProjectCard.tsx is imported only in barrel index.ts but not used in ControlPlane — remove or integrate. Audit styles.css for unused legacy classes.

tasks.name: Fix ADRBrowser hardcoded colors and remove stale fallback
tasks.description: UX-F08/UAT-F18: ADRBrowser.tsx uses hardcoded hex colors (text-[#f0883e], bg-[#1f2937]) and has 150 lines of hardcoded fallback ADR data. Replace colors with theme-aware Tailwind classes. Remove or gate fallback data with 'offline' warning.

phases.name: Sprint 4: Responsive + Accessibility
phases.description: Fix responsive breakpoints, add focus indicators, improve mobile nav, add a11y features.

tasks.name: Make fixed-width panels responsive
tasks.description: UX-F06/F07: ADRBrowser left panel (280px fixed), FileTreeView (280px), WorkplanView table (440px fixed grid) break on mobile. Add responsive Tailwind classes (w-64 md:w-72), collapsible panels, or card layout fallback below md breakpoint.

tasks.name: Add focus-visible indicators and a11y improvements
tasks.description: UX-F11/F16: Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-cyan-500/40 to all nav buttons in App.tsx sidebar. Add text labels alongside status color dots in AgentFleet, HealthPane. Replace emoji icons in FileTreeView with SVG (UX-F22).

tasks.name: Complete mobile nav with More menu
tasks.description: UX-F19: Mobile bottom tabs only show 3 items (Projects, Agents, Inference). Add a 'More' tab that opens a slide-up menu with Fleet, Workplans, Config, ADRs. Ensure all sidebar items are reachable on mobile.

phases.name: Sprint 5: Missing Features + Polish
phases.description: Wire remaining backend capabilities to UI, fix minor issues, polish interactions.

gate.command: cd hex-nexus && cargo check && cd assets && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.name: Add swarm completion notifications and fix duplicates
tasks.description: UAT-F20: hexflo-monitor.ts only toasts on failures, not completions. Add completion toast. UAT-F11: Remove duplicate analyze commands from commands.ts. UAT-F12: Fix nav.swarms to navigate to a real swarms view.

tasks.name: Fix miscellaneous UI issues
tasks.description: UAT-F13: ControlPlane healthScore() returns fake score — show '--' when no data. UAT-F14: Plan/Build mode toggle has no functional effect — wire into chat. UX-F10: Breadcrumbs show raw project IDs — resolve to names. UX-F17: Toast exit animation. UX-F09: ProjectCard hover group fix. UX-F21: CommandPalette createMemo → createEffect.

tasks.name: Add git error states and SpacetimeDB URI config
tasks.description: UAT-F07: git.ts silently swallows fetch errors. Add toast or inline error state when git fetches fail. UAT-F09: SpacetimeDB connection uses hardcoded ws://localhost:3000. Make configurable via /api/version response. UAT-F17: Cache project registration in git.ts to avoid redundant REST calls.
